hero.title: The Vankari Debt
hero.tagline: Power protects the guilty — jab tak koi use collect karne ka decide na kare. Ek dark thriller modern India ke backdrop par jahan ancient tribal secrets aur deadly consequences aapas me takrate hain.

about.title: About AI-OS
about.subtitle: AI Overall Solutions — Engineered by Anuj.
about.para1: AI-OS ek enterprise-grade execution platform hai jise A.R. Labs ne design kiya hai taaki advanced algorithmic tools, workflows, aur automated pipeline generation sabhi ke liye accessible ho sake.
about.para2: Whether you want to generate creative videos, build applications, draft code, or automate complex business workflows, AI-OS dynamically optimized workflow roadmaps compile karta hai, single universal master prompts provide karta hai, aur world-class tool chains recommend karta hai. Yahan koi course syllabus plans, theory chapters, ya certification checkpoints nahi hain—sirf step-by-step execution guides hain taaki aap apna objective achieve kar sakein.

bottomShowcase.tagline: The Literary Universe of Anuj Rawal

quickStartCard.title: ⚡ Quick Start
quickStartCard.subtitle: Apna task sirf 3 simple steps me complete karo.
quickStartCard.step1Desc: Aap kya create karna chahte hain uski details enter karo.
quickStartCard.step1Placeholder: Apna idea describe karo (e.g. futuristic cyberpunk city)...
quickStartCard.step3Desc: Recommended AI tool open karke JSON paste karo.

Design and Prototype Hardware.reason: Industrial design concepts, PCB visualization, product ideation aur hardware renders ke liye best hai.
Design and Prototype Hardware.quick_guide: Apna hardware idea ChatGPT me describe karke JSON prompt generate karein, fir use concept visualize karne ke liye Flux AI me use karein.

Generate a Complete AI Video.reason: Prompt-based workflows ke sath cinematic AI video generation ke liye sabse best tool hai.
Generate a Complete AI Video.quick_guide: ChatGPT se JSON prompt generate karein aur professional video generation ke liye use Flow AI me paste karein.

Generate Professional AI Images.reason: Structured prompts ke sath high-quality image generation support karta hai.
Generate Professional AI Images.quick_guide: ChatGPT se JSON prompt create karein aur seedhe Flow AI me images generate karein.

Create Digital Designs Using AI.reason: Presentations, social media posts, banners, posters aur marketing creatives ke liye best hai.
Create Digital Designs Using AI.quick_guide: Design prompt generate karein aur Canva AI ke andar editable graphics create karein.

Build Software Using AI.reason: Agentic coding environment jo complete applications banane me capable hai.
quick_guide: Windows/macOS/Linux ke liye desktop version download karein.
Agent ko project generate aur edit karne dein.

Build Android Application.reason: Google ki taraf se official Android development environment.
quick_guide: Official website se Android Studio download karein.
Default setup use karke install karein.
Naya project open ya create karein.
Apne preferred AI coding assistant ke sath generated prompt use karein.

Monetize AI Skills.reason: AI services aur digital work sell karne ke liye sabse bade marketplaces me se ek.
Monetize AI Skills.quick_guide: Professional portfolio banao, AI service listings publish karo aur clients acquire karna start karo.

Create Music Using AI.quick_guide: Structured music prompt generate karein aur lyrics aur vocals ke sath complete songs create karein.

Generate Professional Voice Over.quick_guide: Voice-over script generate karein aur natural speech generation ke liye ElevenLabs me paste karein.

Build a Brand Using AI.reason: AI-assisted branding, ideation aur creative workflow generation.
Build a Brand Using AI.quick_guide: Assets create karne se pehle brand strategy, naming ideas aur visual identity prompts generate karein.

Build a Personal AI Assistant.reason: Autonomous multi-agent development aur local execution support karta hai.
quick_guide: Official website se Antigravity desktop download karein.
Generated AI assistant prompt paste karein.
Agent ko assistant automatically create, test aur refine karne dein.
